name: Cross-post content to all socials
description: Solomon takes a piece of content, has Claude rewrite per platform, auto-posts to Facebook (both pages), and hands back Instagram + YouTube versions to Jed via Telegram.
trigger_examples: post this to all socials: We finished framing the deck today, what a day
share across all platforms: New blueprint just dropped
fb + ig + youtube: shop tour video coming Sunday
prompt_template: Run handleCrossPost({{content}}). The existing pipeline auto-posts Facebook to both pages, sends Instagram caption + hashtags to Telegram for manual paste, and sends YouTube community draft to Telegram. Confirm to Jed with success/fail per platform.
escalation_conditions: content references unconfirmed pricing, financial promise, or partnership
content mentions Tasia or the kids without explicit Jed approval in same message

smoke_test.trigger_message: post this to all socials: Finished a 14ft retaining wall today — long day, good work. Be inspired, stay humble, and build.

notes: public_brand category — irreversible Once Posted; classifier should default to high confidence since Jed's intent is explicit.
